tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym wyrazem, tak aby otrzymac spojny, logiczny i poprawny jezykowo tekst. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow.
tasks.title: PENGUINS
tasks.text: Penguins are fascinating birds 1.1. _________ cannot fly, but they are excellent swimmers. There are about eighteen different species of penguins, and most of 1.2. _________ live in the Southern Hemisphere. The Emperor Penguin is the largest species, 1.3. _________ can grow up to 120 centimetres tall. These amazing birds spend much of their time 1.4. _________ the freezing waters of Antarctica, where they hunt 1.5. _________ fish and squid. Emperor Penguins are well known for the way they take care of 1.6. _________ eggs. It is the male 1.7. _________ keeps the egg warm on his feet for about two months, while the female goes to the sea to find food. Penguins live in large groups 1.8. _________ are called colonies. 1.9. _________ they cannot fly, penguins can swim at speeds of up to 36 kilometres 1.10. _________ hour, which makes them very effective hunters underwater.
